author: miaowuduck
description: Bring Stardew Valley characters and pets into your Obsidian vault. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: miaowuduck
manifest.description: Adopt cute pets, befriend 35+ NPCs from Stardew Valley, and let them roam across your notes — with AI-powered speech bubbles that comment on your writing.
manifest.name: stardew-valley-pals

name: stardew-valley-pals

releases.author: miaowuduck
releases.description:
## Changes

### Settings Page Rewrite
- Complete redesign of the settings tab with 6 clearly organized sections: Display, My Pets, AI Configuration, Speech Bubbles, Automatic Rants, Danger Zone
- Improved layout with section headings and descriptions for each group
- Pet management now shows an empty state with a friendly message when no pets exist
- Extracted reusable `sectionHeading()` and `addSlider()` helpers for cleaner code
- Better description text throughout all settings
- Removed sprite preview from pet list to keep it clean and fast

### Version
- Bump version to 1.8.0

releases.author: miaowuduck
releases.description:
## Changes

### Lint Fixes
- Replace `activeWindow` timer calls with `window.*` for popout window compatibility
- Use CSS classes instead of inline style assignments (`bubble.style.visibility` → class)
- Replace `createEl("h2")` with `Setting.setName().setHeading()` for consistent UI
- Replace deprecated `setWarning()` with `setDestructive()`
- Fix `any` types to `unknown`, remove unused imports and variables
- Use `activeDocument` instead of `document` for popout window compatibility
- Reduce CSS `!important` usage (kept only where needed to override Obsidian)
- Fix unnecessary escape character in regex

### Version
- Bump version to 1.7.0

releases.author: miaowuduck
releases.description:
- fix: integrate SecretStorage for OpenAI API key management and replace modals with ConfirmationModal
- fix: add confirmation modals for clearing pets and resetting settings
- fix: enhance pet panel appearance by removing Obsidian chrome and hiding headers
- fix: hide default Obsidian view header in panel mode and update empty state message

releases.author: miaowuduck
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- Fix: release tag format for Obsidian plugin review compatibility (no 'v' prefix)
- Inherits all fixes from 1.4.5 (sidebar leaf selection tracking)

releases.author: miaowuduck
releases.description:
## Fixes

- Track last active MarkdownView to capture selection in sidebar leaf
